Watch: Why the Iran war is pushing up oil prices As turmoil continues in the Middle East, the price of crude oil rose to more than $100 a barrel on Monday. https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/cpv8342e3xvo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/cpv8342e3xvo#1 Mon, 09 Mar 2026 12:30:26 GMT
In maps: Ten days of strikes across the Middle EastIsrael has continued strikes across Iran and Lebanon and the Iranian regime has carried out more attacks, as the war continues for a tenth day. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c4g0pnnj8xyo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c4g0pnnj8xyo#1 Mon, 09 Mar 2026 11:45:19 GMT
Who is Mojtaba Khamenei, Iran's new supreme leader? Many expect the 56-year-old, who has largely kept a low profile, to continue his father's hardline policies. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c78xxg05w0zo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c78xxg05w0zo#1 Sun, 08 Mar 2026 21:51:48 GMT
Watch: Ukrainian anti-drone 'bullet' that could help defend GulfThe BBC's Diplomatic Correspondent, James Landale, is in Ukraine to see the latest anti-drone technology the country has to offer. https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/cpv83ndmezno?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/cpv83ndmezno#1 Mon, 09 Mar 2026 10:15:06 GMT
Australia urged to protect Iranian football team after Asian Cup eliminationConcern has grown for team after one critic called them 'wartime traitors' for failing to salute during the Iranian anthem. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cwy8e978xl8o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cwy8e978xl8o#1 Mon, 09 Mar 2026 06:51:18 GMT
G7 nations to hold emergency meeting on oil as stock markets sinkChancellor Rachel Reeves will join talks amid reports that oil reserves could be released to lower prices. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c79542n0grwo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c79542n0grwo#1 Mon, 09 Mar 2026 11:19:20 GMT
'Night turned into day': Iranians tell of strikes on oil depotsFuel depots were hit in Tehran and Karaj overnight, with videos showing huge fires and plumes of smoke in multiple locations. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/clygpxq41l3o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/clygpxq41l3o#1 Mon, 09 Mar 2026 05:40:05 GMT
Passer-by tried to tackle vape shop blaze that led to infernoLamin Kongira told BBC Scotland News he had been walking past when a shopkeeper ran out saying "fire, fire". https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cd70wdxrrn4o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cd70wdxrrn4o#2 Mon, 09 Mar 2026 12:52:53 GMT
Call off King's US visit over Iran, urge Lib DemsThe party says the planned trip should be scrapped after Donald Trump's criticism of the UK's response to the war. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cz6evlwl68do?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cz6evlwl68do#2 Mon, 09 Mar 2026 11:52:01 GMT
NHS England pauses new prescriptions of cross-sex hormones for under-18sThe health service said young people who already receive the drugs will continue to do so. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cly0ppdzj2yo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cly0ppdzj2yo#2 Mon, 09 Mar 2026 00:39:36 GMT
Princess Eugenie steps down from anti-slavery charityShe had been patron of human rights organisation Anti-Slavery International for seven years. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cwyg2wr75ejo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cwyg2wr75ejo#2 Mon, 09 Mar 2026 11:19:37 GMT
